title: Fluffy Festive Sweetbread
description: A nutty, fluffy, festive Norwegian dish featuring all purpose flour, reduced sugar and sugar-free-friendly for a delightful breakfast treat.
instructions: Preheat your oven to 325°F (160°C). Grease a muffin tin with butter or cooking spray.
In a large mixing bowl, beat the eggs until frothy. Add melted butter and vanilla extract; mix well.
Gradually add in flour, milk, and salt, stirring constantly. If using sugar-free sugar alternative, mix it in now, but keep an eye on sweetness as it can vary greatly.
Divide the batter evenly into prepared muffin cups.
Bake for about 20-25 minutes or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean. Do not overbake!
Allow to cool slightly before serving.
